task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Trash folder to locate the deleted items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Trash' folder is highlighted or selected in the left sidebar of the FreeScout interface, displaying a list of deleted conversations.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies and selects the target ticket to ensure it is preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox next to the conversation titled 'Signed Contract - Q3 2024' is checked, or the conversation itself is opened in the main viewing pane.

task_completion.description: Agent restores the target ticket to the active inbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Restore' button is clicked, a 'Conversation restored' success toast/message is displayed, or the ticket 'Signed Contract - Q3 2024' is visibly listed in an active inbox folder (e.g., Unassigned, Mine) and no longer in the Trash.

task_completion.description: Agent permanently deletes the junk items from the Trash.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The junk conversations ('SEO Proposal', 'You won!', 'Undelivered Mail') are selected and a 'Delete Permanently' action is triggered, or an 'Empty Trash' button is clicked.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully empties the entire Trash folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Trash folder is open and displays an empty state (e.g., 'No conversations found' or a completely empty list), confirming no items remain.

integrity.description: Agent used the FreeScout web GUI rather than terminal commands or direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser interface with FreeScout loaded and standard mouse/keyboard interactions occurring.

integrity.description: The target ticket was actually restored via the UI buttons, not just recreated as a new ticket.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Restore' button (often an arrow icon or text) is clicked from within the Trash folder, or a restoration success notification appears.

integrity.description: The trash was emptied via the UI, not via backend scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Delete Permanently' or 'Empty Trash' button is clicked in the FreeScout UI, followed by the items disappearing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target ticket subject: 'Signed Contract - Q3 2024'. Junk ticket subjects: 'SEO Proposal', 'You won!', 'Undelivered Mail'. The agent must restore the target ticket to the active inbox and permanently delete the junk tickets, leaving the Trash folder completely empty. Pass threshold is 90/100.
